title: psammisia coarctata
intro: Psammisia coarctata is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae, commonly known as the yellow psammisia. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves and stems of Psammisia coarctata contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Psammisia coarctata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
